entry.title: Zero Total Value on PR for Limit Orders in SAP Ariba Guided Buying !
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,  🙌

We are experiencing an issue in our SAP Ariba Guided Buying system, specifically when raising Limit Orders. Despite filling in the minimum amount, maximum amount, and start and end dates, the total value on the PR (Purchase Requisition) is appearing as zero.

Background of the Issue: 👈

1.System Customisation: Our SAP Ariba solution is highly customised to align with our organisation's requirements.

2.Recent Changes: Guided Sourcing was recently implemented and went live successfully.

3. Specific Impact: The issue seems isolated to Limit Orders only. Other functionalities are working as expected.

Actions Taken: 👈

1. We raised a P2 ticket in Ariba Connect with our internal tech team.

2. The issue was escalated to SAP's Brazil team. However, after 10 days, we are yet to receive a concrete solution.

3. The SAP Ariba team has asked multiple questions regarding system behavior, but we haven’t seen progress towards a resolution.

Request for Assistance: 👈

We would like insights from the SAP Community on:

1. Troubleshooting Guidance: Have you encountered similar issues with Limit Orders? If yes, how was it resolved?

2. Turnaround Workarounds: Are there any temporary fixes or alternative processes we could use to bypass this issue while waiting for a resolution from SAP?

3. Configuration Tips: Could this be related to a missing or incorrect configuration in New guided sourcing, Guided Buying or the integration between Ariba and SAP ECC/R3?

We would appreciate any advice or suggestions from the community to address this issue. 

Note: For reference, screenshots highlighting the issue and the PR behaviour have been attached to provide additional clarity.

Thank you in advance for your support!

SAP Guided Buying for SAP S/4HANA SAP Ariba Procurement, cloud edition SAP Ariba Contracts SAP Help Portal  RISE with SAP 

@Harish_Vatsa  @Abhijit_Shinde @KateMcCusker_ @ajmaradiaga @JorgeAlonso @BijayKumarBarik @aribaconsultant @I508691 @amandalaldin l

entry.title: Service Contract/Service Order Text type
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

Can I add more text types to a Service Contract or Service Order in Config?

Soma

entry.title: Re: How to expose custom fields of Quality Notifications...

entry.title: Re: WBS Field need to be editable when User status is ZWCN.
entry.content:
Which exact field do you want to be able to change, and what did you already customize or code?

  • Tr. SPRO / (OPUJ and) OPUK Define Field Selection for Work Breakdown Structures - SAP Note 1113818 - Field Selection for objects in Project System
  • BAdI WORKBREAKDOWN_UPDATE or similar

entry.title: Re: Security Certificate is not from a trusted certifying...
entry.content: Thanks! It works.

entry.title: Re: App for Excess inventory analysis
entry.content: Are there any fiori apps for Surplu/Obsolete Material analysis?

entry.title: Re: API Management is not working for me
entry.content:
Hello Sujith, 

Trial SAP BTP Personal Account
Home - Trial Home - SAP BTP Cockpit (ondemand.com)
create a Account

Select Services > Instances and subscriptions.


Select Create.

In the New Instance or Subscription dialog box, select the Integration Suite option from the list of services.

 

Go back to Instances and subscriptions. Select Integration Suite. On the Integration Suite overview page, click Go to application. You will now be redirected to the Integration Suite home page.

Select the Add Capabilities option on the Integration Suite start page to activate the Integration Suite functions

Aktivate API Business Hub 

 

greatings Andre

entry.title: Copying PI to another environment
entry.content:
Hello community!

I need to know how to make a copy of a PI to another environment, using Netweaver this will be the first time I do this.

It's an ECC EHP8.

Thanks in advance!

Yours sincerely!

entry.title: Re: Enable OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code for Sales Order (A2X) API
entry.content:
@kienklklk 

For Custom APIs, you first need to create a custom communication scenario using the Custom Communication Scenario App with the Business Role SAP_BR_EXTENSIBILITY_SPEC. Use your custom API as Inbound Service.

Then you can create a new Communication Arrangement with your SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR role. You will find your custom communication scenario, which starts always with YY1_*. Then follow the guide exactly like on the default communication scenarios.

I hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Upload rendered PDF document into BTP document manangement service in SAPUI5 Application
entry.content:
Hi @Jacky_Liu ,

Is there a way we can eliminate the hardcoding of the repository ID in the post request?

entry.title: The Invoice of Order with Billing Plan Cannot Include Free of Charge Item (CBXN)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have found no way to include the free of charge item in Billing document that order uses billing plan.

In S4H public cloud, we need to use CBAO to enable billing plan of sales order. For the free of charge item now, i am now using CBXN in sales order. CBXN is not able to include in the billing document together with CBAO.

CBXN seems deliver-billing relevant while CBAO is Order-billing relvent in item category and they cannot be combined into one billing document.

Do I need to use another item category for free-of-charge item when sales order enable billing document?
How should I include the free of charge item include billing document?

Please advise.

entry.title: Restrict mobile access to specific module
entry.content: We want to restrict access to Mobile Performance to a specific pilot group whilst at the same time allow all users acces to Mobile Learning. Is there any  way to achieve this?

entry.title: Re: Inbound/outbound delivery enquiries
entry.content: After enable "01(Goods Receipt Insp. for Purchase Order)", the inbound delivery cannot generate inspection lot.

entry.title: Re: How do I get a variable, or object from ABAP STACK.
entry.content: Thank you for the constructive and valuable instructions. Works well!

entry.title: Re: Query with SAP Note 3508244 - Incompatible Change in...
entry.content: You should be opening a Support case for this. Since you are able to query the SoF table and get the rest of the records from the CSV file, it is clear that you have properly created the the SoF table. Since the the table is configured properly, the fact that the last record from the CSV file is not being returned in the result set is something that you should submit as a Support incident.

entry.title: New Product Compliance Integration EWM
entry.content:
Hi experts,

is there any document available to check the currently excluded functionality in product compliance?

In a meeting a few month ago I received the information that the new product compliance functionality is not available for EWM postings. i.e. dangerous goods processing and blocking of ewm delivery.

I didn't see any future development in the road map so I was curious to double check.

Kind regards

Michael

entry.title: Re: Joule on Mobile & Start Screen Personalization: SAP Mobile Start V2.1 - Release Update
entry.content:
Hi @ThiloBerndt 

Thank you very much for this detailed blog, after reading the news about SAP Mobile Start, I think that many have not yet realized the importance of SAP Start in the business, whether we are Consultants or Users.

Congratulations, you are doing a great job.

Best regards,

Erick

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: Issue with Data Sync in SAM 2405
entry.content: Unfortunately that is a backend internal error.  I am not able to provide any insight there and will have to let the SSAM backend experts reply.

entry.title: Re: The Invoice of Order with Billing Plan Cannot Include Free of Charge Item (CBXN)
entry.content:
The business requirement is:
1. Create sales order with normal item and free of charge item
2. Sales order needs to use down payment and enable billing plan as a result
3. Post invoice for this sales order in Final Invoice
4. The expected result is the invoice with all items in sales order inputed in step 1.

Now, using CBXN and CBAO together cannot achieve the above normal flow in S4H pubilc cloud.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Migration Cockpit Error "Another activity is in...
entry.content:
Hi moeez,

You can solve this issue (most of the time) using the resolution step at the note below:

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003476775 

Greets

entry.title: Combining multiple IDOCs into one file at the receiving end in SAP CPI.
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a requirement to combine multiple idocs into one single file. It is a DESADV.DELVRY03 structure. 

So the output structure should be like;

<DELVRY03>

<IDOC Begin="1">

</IDOC>

</DELVRY03>

For my requirement, it uses Trading Partner Management and in TPM only packet size of 1 supports. So before entering TPM I have used a splitter, and at the receiver end, I have used a custom integration flow and I need to combine the IDOCs using SAP_CorrelationID. 

How is it possible to do the above requirement in SAP CPI?

Thanks,

Radhika

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between acceleratorservices.batch.impex.max-threads and impex.import.work
entry.content:
+1 Great answer! Thanks.

Just some extra info:

Default Properties | SAP Help Portal

Data Importing | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Posting Vendor invoices in Italy company
entry.content:
It has come to my understanding that the Vendor invoices posted in SAP (into FI) should be posted with different Document types depending on if the purchase is done from an Italian company, within EU or outside EU.

We are using a VIM-solution, so I am looking for an automated way to get correct document type for purchase in an automatic way. For Logistics Invoices there must be some kind of lookup to get document type. 

Is there a recommended way to solve this? I have not been able to find notes regarding this.

Best Regards

Ann-Sofie

entry.title: TTy Code; error AA816; the TTy does not exist in FI-AA
entry.content: When doing a normal FB01 posting of and inputting a TTy Code, I am getting error AA816; the TTy does not exist in FI-AA. I understand i ti s looking for the configuration in FI-AA (TCode AO73). However, my concern is why is it looking for this configuration in the first place when it is a general SA doc type (GL general posting)?

entry.title: Attachment in mobile services Can anyone guide me on how to set it up?
entry.content: I am using the attachment tool to capture images from the mobile device, how should I set it up so that the captured images are sent to a server and I can refer to them when I need them, where can I find documentation, what do you recommend I do?

entry.title: Re: No RFC authorization for function module RFCPING.
entry.content: Hello, I managed to solve the problem! Thank you very much!!

entry.title: Re: Unable to download Agent 3 on Mac
entry.content:
Hi Giancarlo-Martinez,

The firewall is not active. This is a personal device and not an official company laptop. 

Are there any other suggestions or settings that I can check? As I mentioned in my original post, I have full administrative privileges on the device.  Can the download be made available from this website?

https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#cloud 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: move & move back of table changes order of objects =>...
entry.content:
Panels are your friend here 🙂

The above example I have 2 Tabs:  Tab_1 & Tab_2
pnl_1 sits on Tab_1  
pnl_2 sits on Tab_2

Table_1 sits inside pnl_1 
The listbox sits outside the panel - ergo it's always on top.



Code used:

The button on Tab_1 used to move the Table contains this code:
pnl_2.moveWidget(Table_1);
TabStrip_1.setSelectedKey('Tab_2');
Table_1.openNavigationPanel();

The button on Tab_2 uses this code:

pnl_1.moveWidget(Table_1);
TabStrip_1.setSelectedKey('Tab_1');

entry.title: How do I enable the smart search (auto complete) in the command bar in business client 8.00
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have search everywhere but I can tenable the smart search or auto-complete or enhanced search in the command bar like the image below. It works well in the field and the ok field (by menu)

Anyone know how?

We have all the prerequisites.

please see image

entry.title: How to handle Invoice by Delivery Document with Down payment request
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I would like to know how to handle Invoice by Delivery Document with Down payment request

My client's business normal business flow to invoice by delivery documents. Over 80% order needs to do so since all business are export orders to oversea. Some orders they needs to get down payment and they would like their sales team to prepare down payment request to smooth the flow to book down payment in accounting team.

I check that there is a flow in BKJ for sales order processing with customer down payment request. It seems goods in Down payment request part.

https://education.hana.ondemand.com/education/pub/s4/index.html?library=library.txt&show=book!BO_343579C1CFDE56B0#book!BO_143A8BD19EDC0F8E

However, this is not working with my client business since BKJ cannot create billing document form delivery document. It is becase CBAO setup in S4H public cloud is fixed with order-billing relevant instead of delivery billing relevent.

Also, when using CBAO, the sales order cannot combine other delivery document to create billing documents together. The billing document must be combined for the sales orders with delivery in my client business to fulfill the custom requirement as well as end-customer requirement.

Are there any configuration I could do to allow Order with billing plan to create billing document from delivery document in S4H public cloud/

Or Do there any other flows I could follow in order to achieve Invoice by Delivery Document with Down payment request?

Please advise.

entry.title: Re: Integration SAP DRC (cloud edition) with SAP Ariba Ce...
entry.content: Hi Sergen, in your test environment you can use any ID, but based on Peppol, in production you should use the ID that is defined by the scheme type. So the enhancement with the company code is theoretically not allowed. Best regards Gabor

entry.title: Subcomponent of subcontracted material (main material) is not showing in MD4C
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Good day,

I would just like to ask if is there a setting that I need to enable to be able to see the subcomponent of subcontracted material (main material/finished goods). As you can see from the screenshot below. For material 9957***** we can see the subcomponent in the MD4C, but for the other material, the subcomponent is not visible like material 9287*****, 9280*****, and 9284*****.

I have checked and compared the material, but they are maintained the same. 

 

So, I would just like to ask if anything is there else that I missed.

entry.title: Solution for proof batch delivery for outbound delivery
entry.content:
Dear Sir

Case:


The customer requests that the expense and Revenue must be in the same month according to the standard work cycle of the sap that is being worked on now, a sales order is created for a quantity of 100 pieces, and then an invoice is created for 100 pieces, then delivery is created for 100 pieces, and then PGI OBD for 100 pieces, but the Stock are still already in the Storage location and 100 pieces are sent in separate batches according to the needs of the Sold-to-party request to different Ship-to-Party forwarders.


business needs


We need a solution that confirms and tracks and prints the delivery of batches to different Ship-to-Party forwarders and each batch has a different freight order according to the location of the Ship-to-Party to which it will be shipped.
And the ability to track the quantities that have been delivered and the remaining quantities that have not been delivered for the same delivery.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP BTP - Forms Service by Adobe and Forms Service by Adobe API free tier
entry.content:
Hi,

I create an instance for Forms Service by Adobe and Forms Service by Adobe API using Free plan.

I also add the roles ADSAdmin and TemplateStoreAdmin to my user.

I am now trying to access the configuration UI using the following links provided in the documentation, links:

https://<sudbomain>-ads.formsprocessing.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/ui/customer/index.html
https://<sudbomain>-ads.formsprocessing.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/adsrestapi/ui.html

For some reason it´s not possible to me to access it.

Can you help me with this issue?

Best Regards

Jose Pimenta

entry.title: Content is not loading for Custom AICC Wrapper
entry.content:
We have created a Custom AICC wrapper by following the KBA 2317484 - How to Customise AICC Wrapper - [LMS]

Item ID: Wrapper_Test
Content Object ID: Wrapper_Test

 

 

content URL:  /learning/user/onlineaccess/icontent.do?Course=CUSTOM_eu&url=/self-managed/Wrapper_Test/ProccedCancel/wrapper.html

Parameters:  docURL=/learning/user/onlineaccess/icontent.do?Course=CUSTOM_eu&url=/self-managed/Wrapper_Test/ProccedCancel/AUP_EN_Celestica_2.pdf

 

 

When we launch the item, it is not able to find the PDF placed in the iContent server. We tried with various other URLs, but none are working.

 

 

Both Custom AICC wrapper and the PDF content file is placed in the iContent server.

The URL prefix is taken from the Content Deployment location. 
/learning/user/onlineaccess/icontent.do?Course=CUSTOM_eu&url=/self-managed/

Please advise if we have missed anything.

Thanks,
Rup

entry.title: Re: Request for new features in SAP S/4HANA Financials
entry.content: As it seems SAP Note/KBA 2781855 has been removed.

entry.title: I need to make a copy of Systema PI Netweaver 7.5
entry.content:
Aqui está a tradução para o inglês:

Hello community!

I need to make a copy of the PI System, I know how to do this using the SAP GUI.

I need to know if there is a step-by-step note, please.

Or any documentation.

Or any instructions you can provide, I would really appreciate it!

The system is an EHP8.

Best Regards!!

entry.title: Solution for proof batch delivery for outbound delivery
entry.content:
Dear Sir

Case:

The customer requests that the expense and Revenue must be in the same month according to the standard work cycle of the sap that is being worked on now, a sales order is created for a quantity of 100 pieces, and then an invoice is created for 100 pieces, then delivery is created for 100 pieces, and then PGI OBD for 100 pieces, but the Stock are still already in the Storage location and 100 pieces are sent in separate batches according to the needs of the Sold-to-party request to different Ship-to-Party forwarders.

business needs

We need a solution that confirms and tracks and prints the delivery of batches to different Ship-to-Party forwarders and each batch has a different freight order according to the location of the Ship-to-Party to which it will be shipped.
And the ability to track the quantities that have been delivered and the remaining quantities that have not been delivered for the same delivery.

Thanks

Hi Experts,

In S4H public cloud, is it possible to add the Customer Ref. Date of Sales Inquiry Item to Sales > Grid in front of First Date Field?
My client must use sales inquiry to create sales quotation and then create sales order.

Since sales inquiry has only GUI form, I would like to ask any possibility to add standard field in GUI form.

entry.title: Cancellation with error KO88
entry.content:
Dear All,

The settlement of internal order was carried out successfully by transaction KO88, now we area trying to reverse the settlement by the same transaction. When executing the cancellation, the system first show a confirmation of success, then a cancellation windows is displayed, when we go to st22, a dump error is displayed in SAPLFLQEXT.

entry.title: Using ODBC 18 driver Crystal Reports runtime (SP34) cuts down memo fields to 255 chars.
entry.content:
We started using ODBC18 driver with crystal reports runtime and memo fields are cut down to 255 chars. Designer works fine but runtime truncates. 
Is this a known issue and is ODBC18 supported by crystal runtime? 

Many thanks for any info.

entry.title: How to exclude system and technical users roles from filter query
entry.content:
Hello

I am trying to retrieve a list of users but want to exclude system and technical user roles such as ('BGRFCUSER', 'S4H_FIN','S4H_ECM_EE2', 'S4H_HCM_EE2', 'S4H_MM') etc. However, every time a new system/technical user role is added to the exclusion query, a different one shows up in the output. What method could I use to only retrieve actual users without having to declaratively state each user that I do not want to display in the output?

SELECT * FROM swwuserwi INTO TABLE lt_users
WHERE wi_id <> ls_swwwihead-wi_id AND user_id <> ls_swwwihead-wi_aagent AND
user_id NOT IN ('BGRFCUSER', 'S4H_FIN','S4H_ECM_EE2', 'S4H_HCM_EE2', 'S4H_MM', 'S4H_HCM_MGR2' )

entry.title: Re: How to add exception handling in SAP HANA CURSOR.
entry.content: What programming language do you use? Could you add your code into the question?

entry.title: Tips to reference a SAC add in Excel Table as any "standard" Excel Table
entry.content:
Recently we’ve introduced the capability to change the name of the add-in table to make it more business oriented. Then, from a new menu it's possible to rename each table. Once renamed the new name can be retrieved via the "SAP.GETTABLE NAME" and visible in the name range area.

We get the question how to make standard Excel array/table formulas work on SACTable1 object (or renamed object, "Budget" in our example)  just like normal Excel tables to be used on standard Excel functions.

Let's take Excel   "FILTER" function as example. This function lets you filter a range of data based on criteria you define based on multiple conditions and display only the columns you need—all automatically.  This "range " in our case, is retrieved by the Add in table name, which refers to a dynamic table range as any Excel table.   

The specificity here is that the headers need to be removed from the selection of the Add in table. And the filter function will be  =FILTER(OFFSET(SACBudget;4;);INDEX(OFFSET(SACBudget;4;;);0;3)="Racing"). 

Except that the add in table object works as any standard Excel table and can be easily used in dynamic array/formulas. 

Try it by yourself with your dynamic formulas!

SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Office

SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Office 

SAP Analytics Cloud for planning

entry.title: S/4 HANA Cloudification Guide for Developer: Navigating to Released APIs from Classic Objects
entry.content:
Introduction

This blog aims to provide a simple guide for discovering newly released APIs that replace traditional SAP objects, including tables, function modules, class objects, and more.

Whether your organization is implementing Clean Core mindset in S4/HANA On-remise or going through cloud migration(SAP RISE Private Cloud/Public Cloud), one of the first steps towards cloudification is to assess the existing custom solutions are clean core compatible. 

The 3-tier extensibility model is a classification that provides rough idea of how much risk of system upgrade will disrupt your custom solution and how protected and stable it is. In the prerequisite of Tier 1, which by definition has the smallest risk of getting affected by upgrade disruption, states the enforced usage of released APIs. Using released objects is a must and a first step towards clean core way of building custom solutions in your SAP system. 

The challenge with deprecated objects

Before this clean core concept or 3-tier extension model were introduced, the standard way to extend SAP ERP core is using now so-called classic extensibility, which corresponds to the 3rd-tier in the 3tier-extensibility model. Organizations operating with SAP before this new concept are most likely full of classic extensibility solution. If their system is rated with today's clean core standard, the result will probably say it's not cloud ready/compatible. Number of SAP objects used in the classic solution are now labeled as deprecated in the new standard, resulting in renovating all the custom solution that uses the deprecated objects. To adapt to the new standard, it is crucial to map the deprecated objects to the new released APIs to ensure the functionality and the performance of the custom solutions.

(This is, of course, not customer's fault as back then the solutions were probably implemented with the newest technology, insight and standard of that time.)

With this in mind, let's look at what's the easiest way to find released APIs for each classic ABAP objects.

1. Classic objects ➡️ Released objects   

Database Tables

The easiest way is to use Fiori App: View Browser(F2170). Check out ➡️ Finding released CDS views for classic SAP tables  for detailed steps to find released CDS views for classic SAP tables. 

The second easiest way is to use SAP Cloudification Repository, which is also covered in the blog above (however not all objects are listed).

Function Modules / Class

Open the function module in question with ABAP Development Tool(ADT). Open Properties->API State and the successor object is specified.

Example below checks for function module BAPI_PO_CHANGE and class object CL_SD_DOCUMENT_FLOW_RT.

 

 

Alternatively, you can use SAP Cloudification Repository(however not all objects are listed).

 

Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) Definitions 

Open the BAdI Definition in question with ABAP Development Tool(ADT). When opening the object, the enhancement spot that uses the BAdI Definition should open and all the BAdI Definitions will be listed. Right click on the BAdI Definition in question -> API State -> Display Use System-Internally.

Example below checks for BAdI Definition MEOUT_BAPI_CUST.

Release state is shown as well as the successor objects if you click Next.

 

 

 

Function Interfaces, Authorization Object, Data Types..etc.

Successor for rest of objects can be found in ADT same way as function module and class objects.   

 

2. Exploring released APIs

In ABAP Development Tool(ADT)

ADT offers tree views to list all the objects depending on the object release status. You can also customize the tree as you see fit by adding Application Component, Packages and Software Component as an extra layer. It does not only show the released objects but also deprecated objects as well as deprecated objects with successors. 

Check out ➡️ Exploring released APIs in ABAP Development Tool for step-by-step guide. 

 

 

Trees that show Released Objects, Deprecated Objects and Deprecated Objects with Successors

 

In SAP Accelerator Hub

SAP Accelerator Hub is an alternative to find API's for those that don't have developer access and want to explore APIs from business context. It contains not just APIs for tier1/tier2 cloud development, but also out-of-box template for business processes, integration scenarios, events based solutions and everything you need for extension your SAP ERP system. Choose your product(S/4 Public/Private Edition, BTP, etc) and start exploring.

Filter the package and explore released APIs with your desired business area.  

 

Appendix

Released APIs

APIs marked as released are indication that they are technically stable and is the only option available in tier 1 extension to communicate with SAP backend. SAP categorizes the released objects in 5 ways depending on the types and the intension of the extension. In this blog, we focus on the cloudification of SAP objects used for custom development hence will only touch on C1 Contract (Use System-Internally).

  • Extend (C0)
  • Use System-Internally (C1)
  • Use as Remote API (C2)
  • Manage Configuration Content (C3)
  • Use in ABAP-Managed Database Procedures (C4)

C1 Contract (Use System-Internally)

Released in C1 contracts indicate that the object is stable enough to be used in Key-User Extension(Custom fields and Custom Logic apps) and Developer Extensibility(custom solution developed solely by ABAP Development for Cloud language scope). The release state is managed separately for each usage and can be found in ABAP Development Tool.

entry.title: Re: BAS Remote Extension Host Terminated
entry.content:
The SAP support developers helped us investigate this issue. Even though we could not find which Extension was causing this problem, but whatever extension it was, it kept re-activating itself and as it did that it made the Storyboard popup generate again every minute or so.

So as a workaround we created a brand new DevSpace, without any additional extensions, downloaded the projects from old DevSpace and moved into the new DevSpace. And the issue is gone.

It's unfortunate that we couldn't find the culprit extension, as it makes it difficult now to trust any of the extensions available for BAS. But at least the problem is gone and we can continue developing.

Many thanks to SAP support developers.

entry.title: Where can I start learning consumption-based planning in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Using Consumption-Based Planning in SAP S/4HANA learning journey.

Overview
This course provides a comprehensive understanding of consumption-based planning in SAP S/4HANA.

Learning objectives
After completing this course, consultants and business users will be able to:

  • Describe the features and methods of consumption-based planning
  • Explain and control the steps of a planning run specifically for consumption-based planning
  • Perform a planning run and analyze the results
  • Decide on the usage and definition of MRP areas
  • Run a forecast and use the forecast results for planning

Prerequisites
For learners who need to learn the basic procurement business scenarios, please visit the learning journey: 
Exploring the Basics of External Procurement in SAP S/4HANA

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: AI Core - train a Foundation model on additional data
entry.content:
Training a model in aicore is most of the time in tutorials done by specifying a pipeline yaml file which then takes the docker image, takes the data from aws and then runs a python script with sklearn to somehow train some model (i have no idea which they never specify what they are even training) and then they save that model on the s3 bucket.

But i want to use one of the foundation models and train that on additional data since i want to make use of the text, image and speech capabilities of a gpt version so how do i need to write the pipeline file and the python training file to train a foundation model instead of a default model ?

entry.title: Re: I want to know the history of memory usage in HANADB
entry.content:
I would suggest starting here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/bed8c14f9f024763b0777aa72b5436f6/db6ca50424714af8b370960c04ce667b.html?version=2.0.06&locale=en-US

Best regards,
--Vitaliy

entry.title: Invalid manager message with off cycle event batch
entry.content:
Dear community, 

we are trying to set up an off cycle event batch to update our job information based on the seniority date of the employee. 

The thing is, we are receiving the following error message when it runs:

The manager {"userDisplayValue":"" userId:"NO_MANAGER"} for user 00010010 does not exist or was not yet hired as of 11/16/2024.

Our employee doesn't have any manager assigned to his profile, but if we assign an employee as a manager, we receive the same error (but mentioning the user id of the manager)

Can you help figuring out how to overcome this?

Thank you

Laura

entry.title: Not able to make the New column to show in front screen of a app based on Analytical Query CDS view
entry.content:
Hi all,

I got a requirement to add a new column in the existing fiori report.  This report is published as ODATA service using a CDS view in backend . This CDS view is Analytical query CDS view. 

But new column "Open Amount" what i added is not showing in front of the report, i need to select this from settings and make it available in the report. I want this to show by default in the report. I have even tried @ui.lineitem.position annotation as well, also priority as #HIGH that didnt work. 

 

Also i want to add one more selection field in this app, for that i dont see any selection field annotation used in the CDS view but still i am able to see there are some input fields in this app. Not sure how to it is added. I thought since it is a analytical query it must have created using "Custom Analytical Queries" app but i could'nt find this query view ( Z_JOURNAL_Q010) there neither.

I also checked if there is any metadata extension view created for this but there nothing found in where used list of this analytical query. Only change it accepts is to add a new field but none of the annotations to position this or selection field works for this . 

 

Please let me know how to position the new column by default without selecting it from settings and also add a selection field for this report. 

 

Thanks in advance!!

Regards,

Kameeswaran

entry.title: 公司间销售业务的按单生产业务
entry.content:
Hi ，

我们遇到的业务场景是这样的：

A公司和B公司是集团内部的两个公司，A公司是销售公司，B公司是制造公司。

1）A公司接收到外部客户的订单需求后，在A公司创建对外部客户的销售订单；

2）A公司向B公司采购，B公司基于A公司的订单需求进行生产。需要在B公司实现按销售订单（或按项目需求）进行生产追踪的要求。

我尝试想用5D2-高级公司销售，但是，在论坛中查到5D2是不支持以下业务场景的，

  • Make-to-order
  • 与WBS集成

相关贴子：高级公司间销售限制；

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/%E9%AB%98%E7%BA%A7%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E9%97%B4%E9%94%80%E5%94%AE%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6-%E5%85%AC%E6%9C%89%E4%BA%91erp2302%E7%89%88%E6%9C%AC/ba-p/13559888

我也尝试想用BDN+1P9，但是发现1P9，在B公司是没有销售订单的，无法实现上述需求。

我的疑问是：

在集团内部公司间关联交易的情况下，需要在B公司，即制造公司实现按销售订单生产或按项目生产的模型，可以使用什么Scope Item？

entry.title: Join our SAP Fieldglass Transactions for Contingent Workforce live sessions - Register now
entry.content:
Overview
During this session we will explore topics from the Discovering SAP Fieldglass Contingent Workforce Management Learning Journey.
You will learn how to navigate in the SAP Fieldglass application and complete guided exercises. Your instructor will troubleshoot and answer any questions

Learning objectives
After participating in this live session, you will be able to: 

  • Apply the knowledge you have learned from the Discovering SAP Fieldglass Contingent Workforce Management Learning Journey 
  • Navigate your way around the SAP Fieldglass application and complete the guided exercises

We are looking forward to meet you - Register now*
---------
*To register for live sessions, you must have a valid subscription.
  If you don’t have a subscription, you can purchase one from the SAP Store.

entry.title: Error when setting the deletion flag
entry.content:
Hello

We want to use report PPARCHP1 to set a deletion flag on a production order. The job terminates with the error message

Entry 000093799376 0001 000000000000 already exists
Message no. 26275

 

The same error occurs if you want to set this manually directly in the order.

entry.title: Re: Disabling TaaS When Creating a Sales Document Using D...
entry.content:
We are having the same error message in SP2408 whenever the EDS is called by an end user.  We currently can use it as a PSU in a current CCC environment but end users cannot.   In addition the US TaaS service will not work with the Web Client  There was a fix for this issue which we were pointed at however it was not applicable

3016840 - Cannot Generate Electronic Documents or Reports in Cloud Environments

SAP Business One Notes, Version: 3, Released On: 03.03.2021

We have also been directed to Not 3194512 - US_Tax Service which provided the same configuration requirements as the How To document with a little extra information about firewall access rules and settings in EDS service.

We have the case in escalation, however, if anyone has additional feedback it would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Calculation Views - Graphical vs Directly from Views
entry.content: There were live sessions with SAP experts about modeling calc views recently. You can find recordings here: https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions?page=1&lsc_product=SAP+HANA+Cloud

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community !! 

I am Aurore from Booxi - Based in Paris and Booxi (Appointment Scheduling Software) is an SAP Partner for 1 year ! I will be at NRF in New York City and happy to meet more and more SAP members ! 

Booxi is a solution for in-store appointment scheduling with two primary use cases:

  1. Operational Appointment Management
    Similar to how a spa or hair salon schedules appointments—often paid—Booxi helps streamline processes and maximize occupancy rates.

  2. Drive-to-Store Strategy Implementation
    Retailers use Booxi to organize service-based offers that drive foot traffic to their stores. These can include product discovery sessions, personalized advice, repairs, or after-sales service appointments.

Examples of Booxi use cases:

  • Tiffany’s
  • Optic 2000

entry.title: Re: IBP Format sheet - Can we do directly in IBP Producti...
entry.content:
hi Parthi4,

"What issues/problems we get if we do change/update the Formatting of Cells in IBP Formatting Sheet directly in IBP Production system ? "

-> technically, i don't see a risk, as the Formatting Sheets & Templates are just a way to display the information in Excel.

I think it depends on:

- how many users are already using the template that you want to change/update. If the template is going to be fully changed, it's best to communicate to any users first

- are there any jobs ran directly from the templates (eg statistical forecast runs)? If yes , then the updated template will probably need to follow the same applied filters as the "old" one.

 

But have you considered first to copy the old template , save it as Favorite in Prod -> change it/update -> test it?

A favorite template is not shared by default with anyone, so any changes you made in Prod will not affect anyone.

entry.title: Question about replication flow in initial mode with the status "Retrying"
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question about replication flow in "Initial" mode.

I have put some replication flow (all in "initial") in a task chain. When i run the task for the first time, the data loading works fine, but when i retry to run the same task chain to update my data, some replication flow are in status "Running (Retrying Objects)" (even if the replication is not a delta).I don't understant why.

Datapshere try to run the loading but the same message appears :"The source connector has accepted the initial load partitioning request. The next attempt will be after ..."

Do you know why init replication flow still retrying to load data ? (is not a delta)

Do you already have the same issue ? 

Thanks for the help,

Best regards

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: We need a solution for product Catalog attributes
entry.content:
Dear Sir 

We need a solution for product Catalog attributes 

business needs

requirement Extend the following attributes in the Material Master Data Such as Model with No Color
1-Generic KeywordColor
2-HD IMG
3-Installation Type
4-Status
5-Gross Unit Dimensions
6-Unit Dimensions
7-Energy Star
8-Country of Origin
9-Life span
10-Life Span Description
11-Warranty
12-Warranty Description

Thanks

Is there a way to mass reassign CBC TRs from one user to another?

Thank you!

VG,

Dima

entry.title: Re: Regex help
entry.content:
Ensure your regex engine supports lookahead assertions (?=...) and then try

 

^(?=.{10,18}$)[A-Za-z]{3,7}\.[A-Za-z]{3,10}$

entry.title: Regarding the sap systems and non-sap systems
entry.content:
Hi CPI FAMILY,

I AM VERY NEW CPI, COULD YOU PLEASE GIVE ME ABOUT THE WHICH ARE THE SAP AND NON-SAP systems we do use normally in IFLOWS.

Please describe the SAP&NON-SAP.

entry.title: Re: Data migration sequence for Subscription Billing
entry.content:
Dear Elena, 
from a technical view the sequence in the UI is somewhat the same, because when you create rate plan in the product app it is also created when you close the detail screen of the rate plan. 
When using the APIs, the sequence you're mentioning below is the best one to use:
1. Create rate plan templates
2. Create rate plan with reference to previously created rate plan template ID
3. Create Product and assign previously created rate plan ID 

You could also create first the product, followed by rate plan templates and then rate plans, but that would require that you update the product again with the rate plans - which is more complicated.

Best
Carsten

entry.title: STIHL optimized Sales and Production Planning with SAP Solutions for Synchronized Planning
entry.content:
Grown from a one-man business into a global leader STIHL Group develops, manufactures and distributes power tools for professional forestry and agriculture as well as for garden and landscape maintenance, the construction sector and private garden owners. The product range is complemented by digital solutions and services. Products are distributed through authorized dealers and STIHL’s own online-shops, which will be expanded internationally over the next few years – including 44 sales and marketing subsidiaries, about 120 importers and more than 55,000 servicing dealers in over 160 countries.

Founded in 1926 and with headquarters in Southern Germany, STIHL has been the world's top-selling chainsaw brand since 1971. With a workforce of almost 20,000 employees, the family-owned business generated 5.3 billion euros in revenue in 2023.

Siloed Supply Chain Planning Systems insufficient for Informed Decision-Making
In the past, STIHL’s subsidiaries and production companies relied on their own SAP EEC system, deployed on premise, with a heterogenous landscape for supply chain planning processes 35 sales and 8 production companies  that were tailored to the needs of each subsidiary. “We lacked an end-to-end consolidated view and overall transparency to improve decision-making for the company as a whole and not only for one subsidiary,” said Lena Domhan, Global Process Owner Integrated Planning at STIHL. “Previously, we spent a lot of time analyzing and verifying data and had no single source of truth. In addition, disconnected planning systems hindered collaboration and coordination between subsidiaries.”

Market Trends Driving Change 
With the introduction of new product lines that have integrated batteries STIHL found itself in a new business, selling now also to end customers. “This VUCA world required us to react even faster to volatility and changing demand,” explained Axel Erhard, Senior Vice President, Global ONE STIHL Program Lead. “To optimize planning, we needed a better overview of the different production and sales companies.”

The company established the ONE STIHL program with the goal to consolidate all subsystems across 35 sales and 8 production companies into one single integrated SAP S/4HANA system. Moreover, STIHL aims to bring several solutions into one hybrid ecosystem, such as SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain (SAP IBP) with the components S&OP (sales & operations planning) and R&S (response & supply), SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing for planning and scheduling and SAP S/4 HANA Transportation Management (SAP TM). “One goal of the ONE STIHL project is to reduce fixed capital and get more transparency on different management levels. SAP IBP with SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing for planning and scheduling play a crucial role in this process, serving as the starting point for planning," said Axel.

Introducing a Synchronized Planning Approach for Distribution Center Refillment
“We were one of the first customers to introduce SAP IBP in combination with SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing for planning and scheduling and SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management,” explained Fabio Fender, Interim Global Process Owner Integrated Planning. “With real-time integration, our planners can quickly react, e.g., when tackling issues on the planning or production side they immediately see the impact on the distribution side and vice-versa. That provides confidence and trust.” Georg Fuchs, Director Integrated Planning & Global Solution Architect, ONE STIHL Project, added “order-based planning and real-time integration are the heartbeat of our production. For instance, in Austria finished goods are produced and then shipped to distribution centers in Germany or the Czech Republic. The order-based planning process in SAP IBP is used to allocate, prioritize, and schedule the delivery of these goods. We are de-coupling this from our production plan in SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing for planning and scheduling.”

With this synchronized planning approach STIHL consolidates supply planning, distribution planning and production planning into one seamless process, enabling a holistic workspace for planners. Detailed scheduling results from SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing for planning and scheduling are visible in SAP IBP in real-time, ensuring maximum transparency. In addition, the integration of SAP TM allows to create freight orders to ship STIHL’s finished products. Axel commented “STIHL’s vertically integrated supply chain gives us the potential for end-to-end control.”

Higher Transparency across Subsidiaries enabling accurate Planning
SAP IBP is live at two production sites in Austria and Switzerland and used by several planners and other users utilizing its reporting capabilities. “The integration with SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing for planning and scheduling and SAP S/4HANA TM was the most effective solution to meet our business needs,” remarked Georg.

STIHL already recognizes and anticipates a range of immediate and long-term benefits:

  • Better visibility across subsidiaries, enabling accurate and feasible plans that can adapt to production constraints
  • Increased efficiency as sales and production teams use the same system with one single source of truth for all relevant data
  • End-to end transparency for global planning processes with optimized planning for the network 
  • Time-savings for planners who see real-time impact of changes and can instantly make better-informed decisions
  • Enables creation of feasible production plans to meet customer demand
  • Real-time integration with SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing for planning and scheduling ensures that planners and production teams are using the same data for decision-making
  • Logistics planners can efficiently plan truck load orders and promptly fulfill logistics requirements.
  • Improved customer service while reducing inventory costs through network planning
  • Enhanced decision-making between quantity and revenue planning providing a crucial element of these business processes and reporting.

Future Rollout Plans and Leveraging Artificial Intelligence
“We have 4-5 rollouts ahead of us on our journey. Over the next few years, we will integrate about 40 global subsidiaries into one network planning solution,” said Lena.

In relation to the utilization of artificial intelligence, Axel remarked “STIHL will invest in AI in the future, that is a clear focus of our owners.“ “We are starting to explore potential opportunities to determine what would benefit us. However, regarding SAP IBP, we are already fit for the future, concluded Fabio.”

 

Click here to see what benefits other companies have gained with SAP Integrated Business Planning. Also, read a report from IDC on the role of AI in supply chain planning by clicking here.

Watch a video to see the future of supply chain planning, powered by SAP Integrated Business Planning and infused with the latest SAP Business AI technology, to drive decision making in your supply chain.

In addition, check out the story by clicking here.

entry.title: US taxing procedure TAXUSJ to 0TXUSX
entry.content:
Hello,

Customer has a requirement to configure the US taxing procedure TAXUSJ (manual setup) and after 6 months they want to migrate to external taxing procedure 0TXUSX. Is there a limitation or impact in the migration from manual taxing to 3rd party external taxing procedure.

If needed additional information please let me know.

 

Regards,

Narendra

entry.title: Re: Fixed bin replenishment - How to prevent using source...
entry.content:
Hi.

You need to create a search sequence by storage type according to the replenishment movement, for example:

Replenishment is executed with movement type 320, then you need to set up a new search sequence for that movement:

In this image we see that when we make a Stock Removal movement, the system searches in storage types 311 (fixed bins) and 315, but when replenishment movement 320 is executed with Stock Removal movement, the system only searches in warehouse type 312.

And the E process - Putaway, system looks for a bin in the storage type 311 (fixed bins)

entry.title: IPS transformation assignGroup and multiple groups assignment
entry.content:
Hi All

We are trying to assign groups to users via transformation. It works if no conditions are used. But  if we have more than one condition, only one group is assigned. SCIM 2.0 is used.

We have following gorups

on IAS

On Onprem 

Z_ABAP_GROUP_DEV,

Z_ABAP_GROUP_TST

User has both groups assigned on ABAP system. 

On source system transformation we have 

 

 

{
"targetPath": "$.groups[0].value",
"condition": "$.ACTIVITYGROUPS[?(@.AGR_NAME == 'Z_ABAP_GROUP_TST)] EMPTY false",
"constant": "xxxxxxxx-xxxxxx-xxxx-b94c-62bb6623cc84",
"preserveArrayWithSingleElement": true
},
{
"targetPath": "$.groups[1].value",
"condition": "$.ACTIVITYGROUPS[?(@.AGR_NAME == 'Z_ABAP_GROUP_DEV')] EMPTY false",
"constant": "xxxxxxx-xxxxx-xxxx-9074-ed731f26b374",
"preserveArrayWithSingleElement": true
}

 

 

And this works.

Payload is send to the Target transformation, both groups included

 

on Target side we have 

 

 

{
"condition": "$.groups[?(@.value == 'xxxxxxxx-xxxxxx-xxxx-b94c-62bb6623cc84')] EMPTY false",
"constant": [
{
"id": "xxxxxxxx-xxxxxx-xxx-b94c-62bb6623cc84"
}
],
"targetVariable": "assignGroup"
},
{
"condition": "$.groups[?(@.value == 'xxxxxxx-xxxxx-xxxx-9074-ed731f26b374')] EMPTY false",
"constant": [
{
"id": "xxxxxxx-xxxxx-xxxx-9074-ed731f26b374"
}
],
"targetVariable": "assignGroup"
}

 

 

In result only one group (with id xxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-9074-ed731f26b374 - second form transformation - TST)  is assigned to the user 

If user has only one OnPrem group assigned (...DEV with id xxxxxxxx-xxxxxx-xxx-b94c-62bb6623cc84 first in transformation) this group is assigned properly. 

 

 

Any idea how to fix this ? (Ticket to SAP raised) 

Following code if first "targetVariable": "assignGroup" is removed doesn't works as well 

 

 

{
"condition": "$.groups[?(@.value == 'xxxxxxxx-xxxxxx-xxxx-b94c-62bb6623cc84')] EMPTY false",
"constant": [
{
"id": "xxxxxxxx-xxxxxx-xxx-b94c-62bb6623cc84"
}
]
},
{
"condition": "$.groups[?(@.value == 'xxxxxxx-xxxxx-xxxx-9074-ed731f26b374')] EMPTY false",
"constant": [
{
"id": "xxxxxxx-xxxxx-xxxx-9074-ed731f26b374"
}
],
"targetVariable": "assignGroup"
}

 

 

Regards

Artur

entry.title: SAP Cloud SDK: How to setup requests using the business user instead of communication user (CAP)
entry.content:
Hi community,

I am using SAP Cloud SDK (with Node.js) and want to make a request to S4H Public Cloud with the business user instead of a communication user.

The setup looks like follows:

  • The project is a MTA with a Node.js server and a SAPUI5 application
  • The SAPUI5 application uses a destination with authentification type SAMLAssertion to make calls to OData services which are available on S4H Public Cloud
    • The logged on business user of the S4H Public Cloud system is getting used
    • The destination was setup like described here: Create a Destination to Connect to SAP Business Application Studio | SAP Help Portal
    • This works without problems
  • The SAPUI5 apps then also calls the Node.js server for certain things
    • The Node.js server is using the SAP Cloud SDK to make calls to released OData API services of S4H Public Cloud
    • For this a destination with a communication user is used right now
      • Needed communication arrangement with that comm.user are maintained on the S4H Public Cloud system
      • This works wihtout problems
      • Now I would like to make certain calls to those APIs with the business user (which is logged on in the SAPUI5 app) instead of the communication user
        • I made sure that the APIs support that (a business catalog with the the authorization to call those APIs exists - so the business user is actually allowed to call those APIs if he has assigned a corresponding role which includes that business catalog)
        • I was able to use the SAMLAssertion destination in the SAPUI5 application to call the APIs directly in there - it worked
          • But I would now also like to be able to do the same thing on the Node.js server
          • I'm struggling how to setup the connections (forwarding tokens?)

The part for the connection between the SAPUI5 app and the Node.js server inside xs-app.json looks like follows:

 {
      "source": "^/admin/(.*)$",
      "target": "/admin/$1",
      "destination": "srv-api",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "csrfProtection": true
    }
 
The SAMLAssertion destination on the BTP subaccount looks like follows:

 

 
Has anyone tried this before? Any help is very appreciated!
 
Thank you
Daniel

entry.title: Fix the Price unit as 100 in Grp cur and Grp Valuation for Materials
entry.content:
We raised request with SAP to  execute ZFL_SET_PRICE_UNIT_PR  and correct the Price Unit for

1.  Material 8000XX1  in  plant ABCD. 

2.  Material 8000XX2 in plant ABCD

The price unit needs to be 100 in all 3 Currency/Valuation profiles . 

SAP ran the program and updated but price units as 90 instead of 100. Subsequently SAP processor corrected the price unit fields in table CKMLCR for the materials. However, they are asking for debug&replace authorization to be able to change the entries in MBEW and MBEWH as well. Since debug and replace authorization to SAP is not allowed by security compliance perspective we are at a stalemate . 

My questions are : Can we try correcting MBEW and MBEWH in-house ? If yes, how ? Will there be any side effects and what precautions need to be taken  .

entry.title: Which Purchase Order App/Report Suggested to be Used By QC Inspector
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My client's QC Inspector will check purchase order information when they do inspection lot generation from goods receipt.

They want to view Purchase order information but Purchase order App in Purchasing Page exists Purchase order price information and their management do not allow them to view order price in QC department and only view other purchase information like delivery address, item information and purchase header note and text, etc.

Is that possible to hide the purchase order price and amount information for QC inspector's business role?

Or Do anyone suggest on which purchase order information app or report suitable for QC inspector, provided in S4H public cloud?

entry.title: Re: Automatic HU WT create within storage control
entry.content:
Hi,

"just a guess, because hu task got the storage control and product task not. But please prove me wrong, I'm happy about every solution or hint."

You have a negative decision (correct, yes?) and the WT is triggered by the follow up action. This is not part of the process anymore.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: Group Assignments Based on User Attributes – a Flexible Solution for Managing Conditional & Risk
entry.content:
Hi @ivelinakiryakov, great post.

We are trying to assign more than one group to users based on some conditions, it seems there is a problem if more than one condition is used. More details 
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/ips-transformation-assigngroup-and-multiple-groups-assignment/qaq-p/13956565 thank you for feedback.

entry.title: Re: Employee unable to login with SSO in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
As mentioned above , there could be many reasons for the error so its impossible to give an accurate answer here. Also, since it is an open community, its best not to share details specific to the user here - which would allow you to troubleshoot it. 

In addition to checking out the KBA that is referenced above I would suggest to 

1- Start with running a SAML trace for the affected user to see what is actually happening with the user. This can help to figure out where is the user being sent to authenticate and possibly you can spot the reason here. If not, you can always export the results to diagnose with your internal IT team or SAP Support 

2- Check the users account status - the error message below states that user account might not be active. If you are using Identity Authentication to authenticate then within that application you will be able to check whether the user having issues have their credentials stored in the user store for that application. if it is not included there then this could be the reason. 

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: SAP DataSphere and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
Here is the hands-on: https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-DA180?tab=readme-ov-file#da180---explore-sap-datasphere-and-sap-analytics-cloud-end-to-end

If you are looking for theory, then start at https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/data-analytics, where you have get-started learning journeys listed.

entry.title: Passing Parameters to URL for WebGUI Transactions in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

is it possible to pass a parameter to a URL for a WebGUI transaction in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

In SAP ITS, this functionality was supported (see this reference), but the same URL command does not seem to work in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

I would greatly appreciate any suggestions or guidance on this matter.

Thank you in advance!

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Attachment in mobile services Can anyone guide me on...
entry.content: The question is what does your odata service look like and expect with respect to storing of the images?  Do you have a v2 or v4 service?  Can you share the $metadata of the service so we can review and possibly provide some guidance.

entry.title: Manage Manual Reservations - No direct postings possible to G/L account
entry.content:
Hello expert,

when I make a RESERVATION with the FIORI APP "Manage manual reservatio" F4839, the error message "No direct registration possible on the G/L account" appears and i can not save the document.
If I do same reservation via MB21, with the same Material/Plant/Co.Ge, I dont have any error and the document is saved.
Could you please help me to understand why? What kind of different checks sre done by the FIORI APP F4839?
Thanks a Lot.

Samuele.

entry.title: How can we configure the new Postal City/City number in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content: Mountain view city is not available in the value help for Business Partner address. Is it configurable by SAP Config expert only?

entry.title: Re: Cannot create single file installer in SAP Installati...
entry.content: Hi Tobias, got fixed with SAP Note 3548807

entry.title: Re: move & move back of table changes order of objects =>...
entry.content: Nice workaround James! Up to now I always tried to strictly minimize the number of objects I used. However, I might need to rething my approach.

entry.title: Re: Basic and extended document splitting in SAP S/4 Hana
entry.content: Very helpful. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Delta Accrual not Calculating Amounts
entry.content:
Hallo 

This has been resolved

1. The field WERKS was missing in the config activity >> Define and Configure Profiles for Business Volume Determination

2. There was WS211 error and this has been resolved with the config mentioned in Note 3535525

entry.title: Re: Workzone Header toolbar functions not working
entry.content: Even I have started Facing this issue from this week. All of a sudden the Shell Header toolbar stops working be it back button or search or user profile icon. Any idea anyone?

entry.title: Re: Wrong format in excel download
entry.content:
Hello,

OLE technology is not available within browsers, consequently not available within webgui/Fiori

  • OLE Automation Controller

The controlling of an OLE automation server is not possible.

  • Office Integration

Because Office Integration is based on OLE Automation (a legacy Microsoft Windows technology not available within browsers) it is limited within SAP GUI for HTML. Office Documents can only be viewed but not be changed. 

 

The only workaround available:

3314872 - SAP Desktop Office Integration Support for SAP GUI for HTML and SAP GUI for Java

-> https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-enable-the-sap-desktop-office-integration-for-sap-gui-for-html-and/ba-p/13566119

entry.title: Where can I start learning principles and strategies of SAP Ariba Category Management?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Introducing SAP Ariba Category Management Fundamentals learning journey.

Overview
This course will teach the learner how to create, manage, and monitor category-specific strategies to achieve their organization’s procurement goals.

Learning objectives
Upon the completion of this learning journey, participants will gain insight into how a Category Manager creates a category profile by classifying a product category, uploading company policies, laws, and regulations concerning that specific category, and adding team members and stakeholders that will assist with the execution of the strategy. Then, develop a strategy and plan, including category and market analysis, strategy and implementation, and approval. Finally, monitor the strategy execution to see if goals are met, initiatives are on target, and upcoming events are posted in the planning calendar. 

Prerequisites

  • Learning Journey: Discovering Category Management

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: 404 error while employee applying for a job from inte...
entry.content:
Difficult to help without investigation of the problem.

Anyway, suggestion from my side is to try this:

  • disable ICS (by CSB) in both CSB and RCM
  • post an internal job on ICS (RCM)
  • access an Internal candidate profile in ICS (RCM)
  • perform a job search on ICS (RCM) career site
  • if above works, enable CSB (by CSB) back

 

Regards,

Piotr

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS Views - Using Multiple Data Sources
entry.content:
Hello @Gerd_x Gerd,

I just tested this in a cloud system and do not get the error that you mentioned. You may want to open a ticket with PM-WOC-MN to get support from the application colleagues that provide the view.

Generally, I would not recommend adding fields by following such deep paths. Apart from this, you will multiply your result set as you will get the text in ALL languages unless you filter by the language afterwards. Try adding the text view by defining your own 1..1 association directly to it instead. This may also resolve this inconsistency error.

Best Regards
Andreas

entry.title: Re: SAP Asset Performance Management (APM) – Embedded IoT Now Generally Available
entry.content:
Hi, Do you have any videos of tutorials on Configure AI Capabilities, if yes can you please send me

 

thanks

entry.title: Re: App Manage Bank Accounts (F1366A) – Error in create payment groups
entry.content: Thanks very much for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts.

entry.title: Re: Operational Chart of Account in S/4HANA cloud Private cloud edition
entry.content: Hi! Did you figure out if it is possible to do the renumbering of YCOA accounts on the Private Cloud Edition?

entry.title: Error when replicate Business Partner from S/4HANA Cloud Public to SAP Cloud for Customer (CPI)
entry.content:
Hello there,

I´m try to integrate SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public to SAP Cloud for Customer with SAP Integration Suite, but, when I´m try to replicate BP to C4C using the communication arrangement SAP_COM_0008, SAP C4C return the next error for integration:

No supported role for business partner 1xxxxxxx

Someone have any idea, how I can solve this issue?

 

Thanks,

entry.title: New section in job info
entry.content:
I'm trying to create a new section in Job Info in > Manage Business Configuration but the mandatory fields like Identifier, Section ID, and Based on HRIS Element are not editable. I've already checked the permissions, and it doesn't seem to be a permission issue. Does anyone know if it's possible to create a new section in Job Info, and if so, how to resolve this?

 

Thank you
